text: I said hello. Good afternoon. My name is Cassie. So I'm calling because your Medicare member profile hasn't been transferred into Medicare's national database for twenty-five years. I am so tired of hearing about, and y'all call me every five minutes about Medicare. So you do have to come in about Medicare. Right? Do I have part A and B? The advice I'm going to take over shortly, please stay on the line. No. I'm not. If I'm available, just put me in for it. Thanks for everyone. Anyone in the line? This is Elena. The reason we are on the phone today, because Medicare has introduced some new benefits in your area, and we have to make sure you're not missing out anything you might be eligible for. Well, that's why I say just put me in for it. Thank you.
